product_wedge.primary_user: Solo or small-practice therapist who already values benchmark/template guidance
product_wedge.job_to_be_done: Turn a benchmark/template into a tailored practice recommendation or draft faster
product_wedge.core_workflow: Therapist submits a few structured practice inputs and receives one benchmark-driven output

manual_work: Collect recurring customer questions and requests
Interpret results for the therapist's specific situation
Deliver custom examples or template tweaks by hand
Track whether the same requests repeat often enough to justify software
automated_first: Guided intake form for structured practice inputs
Auto-generated benchmark summary or action-plan draft
mvp_boundary: One workflow: structured input to one tailored output
One key output: benchmark-driven report or draft
One escalation path to manual review
productization_trigger: Build only after the same customization or interpretation workflow repeatedly appears across enough therapist customers that manual delivery becomes a clear bottleneck
do_not_build_yet: Scheduling, billing, EHR, or CRM integrations
